product_information.product_name: Marcel's Green Soap Argan & Oudh Deodorant Stick 40 gram
product_information.description: Marcel's Green Soap Deo Stick Argan & Oudh. De deosticks zijn gemaakt van biologische oliën en baking soda en zijn verpakt in karton

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Sodium Bicarbonate, Zea Mays Starch, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Brassica Campestris Seed Oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed Cera, Cetyl Esters, Tribehenin, Sorbitol/Sebacic Acid Copolymer Behenate, Parfum, Zinc Oxide, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Polyhydroxystearic Acid.
